texto: Time collapsed into a delicate dark pencil brushed against oureyebrows, the emergent rumble of crowds gathering above our heads. Weslid into our costumes. Pirate, outlaw, futuristic rebels. Red,purple, gold. Chains hanging from our belts, tight black trousers. Wewere moved upstairs, closer to the stage. Finally, we heard thecannon's roar: Ladies and gentlemen, please welcome... Tanzarrecording artists... THE MASTER PLANETS!" The world shot forward. Westepped into the spotlight.
explicacao: Citação de Donald Gallinger sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Time collapsed into a delicate dark pencil brushed against oureyebrows, the emergent rumble of cr…” articula tempo, classic-rock, coming-of-age em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e coming-of-age.
